name: toss-place-fe-superpowers
description: A focused Vite React frontend take-home assignment plugin for Toss Place style product work. It helps with deadline rules, question-by-question execution, requirement analysis, product assumptions, Vite architecture, Simple FSD, API and React Query design, component boundaries, abstraction review, reliability checks, test quality, README rationale, and final submission polish.

interface.shortDescription: Vite React take-home workflow for Toss Place style frontend assignments
interface.longDescription: A Codex-first standalone skill pack for frontend take-home assignments, especially Toss Place and offline-commerce-like products. It guides deadline rules, question-by-question execution, product-focused requirement analysis, assumptions, trade-offs, Vite React architecture, Simple FSD structure, API layer design, React Query decisions, component boundaries, abstraction boundary review, reliability checks, test quality review, README rationale writing, and final submission polish.
defaultPrompt: Run the assignment question by question.
Plan a Vite React assignment architecture.
